content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 Beta / test language WARN — release_notes.txt calls the release a "public beta" and says "We're still testing... expect rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2).
Pierre: Apple reviewers treat store-facing language implying an unfinished or beta build as grounds for rejection under 2.2, since the App Store build must be presented as production-ready. The release notes explicitly say "public beta" and warn of "rough edges", which contradicts that expectation. Rewrite the release notes to describe finished features (e.g. "improved sync reliability") without beta/testing language.
